monitor.capture_what: The file path argument passed to open(), which contains the traversal payload after URL-decoding bypasses the '../' literal check

oracle_check.condition_description: The file path passed to open() contains path traversal sequences (../) or is an absolute path (/), indicating the '../' literal check was bypassed via URL-encoding or other obfuscation
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PATH_INJECTION: Path traversal payload reached open() sink — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
